title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and stream local LLMs with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: llama-index-integrations/tools/ollama
summary: LlamaIndex reader and generator nodes for Ollama, enabling RAG pipelines with local models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (chat, admin, model manager) for Ollama servers; install via Docker in 30 s.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI client for Ollama with syntax highlighting, chat history, and keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes suggestions through a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama binaries and OCI images.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and fluent API builders.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama; includes Rails generators and Rake tasks.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for chatting with local LLMs; useful for desktop/mobile apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library with dependency injection helpers and minimal API sample.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to bulk pull, tag, and convert GGUF models into Ollama format.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal React/Electron desktop app to chat with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a ‘Chat with note’ command using an Ollama backend.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that answers questions using a local Ollama model in threads.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Feature-rich Discord.py bot supporting multiple models, per-guild configs, and role-based access.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models in pipelines for QA and summarization.
